name: Shirox
subtitle: Personal anime library manager for iOS
description:
Shirox is a free, open-source personal anime library manager for iOS 15+.

Organize and track your anime collection using community-built modules. AniList integration for library management and discovery.

apps.name: Shirox
apps.subtitle: Personal anime library manager for iOS
apps.localizedDescription:
Shirox is a free, open-source personal anime library manager for iOS 15+.

• Organize your anime collection with community-built modules
• AniList integration for library management and discovery
• Continue Watching — pick up right where you left off
• Picture-in-Picture and AirPlay support
• Subtitle support

news.title: New in 0.0.94 — Library & Local Files
news.caption:
Library: the header now collapses as you scroll using iOS's native large-title behaviour, reclaiming space with an always-visible search bar, while the source switcher and List/Genre filter row scroll away with the title and snap back to the top. The bell in the Library toolbar shows a red badge with your unread AniList notification count (capped at 9+, hidden when there's nothing new); it clears when you open notifications and refreshes on appear and on pull-to-refresh.

Local Files: Continue Watching for local files no longer breaks on resume with "File moved or unavailable." Picked files are now copied into the app's storage and played from that copy, so resuming keeps working across relaunches — imported subtitles persist too. The picker is now a clearer, step-by-step flow: pick the video first, then optionally add a subtitle, with a "Play without subtitle" option, which also fixes the Browse button doing nothing when the subtitle toggle was on.

news.title: New in 0.0.92 - Local Library
news.caption: Track anime without signing into any account. A My Library section lives in the Library tab and works completely on device — bookmark anime, set a status, rate it, and create collections. Auto-tracking keeps your episode progress in sync as you watch, and your scores now survive switching Score Format. Player: a Retry button when buffering stalls, a resume seek fix for HLS, smoother controls, cleaner double-tap feedback, and 2x hold that sticks while you drag. Plus Library search bar and source switcher fixes, and a Local Files promo card on the Modules screen.

news.title: New in 0.0.91 — Local Files
news.caption:
Play videos straight from your device. Browse to any video in the Files app and watch it in the Shirox player with full controls — AirPlay, PiP, subtitles, and Continue Watching all included. Import your own subtitle files before or during playback.

Also fixed: the refresh and Edit buttons now appear at the top of the module list in Search, and the Local Files Browse button has a cleaner look.
